description: L2 decision whose business driver is absent from source and not inferable from context
source: We're using SurrealDB for the decision graph instead of PostgreSQL.
rationale: Fork exists: SurrealDB vs PostgreSQL is a real architectural choice two teams might make differently. Gate 2 passes. But Gate 1 fails in isolation: no business driver is visible in the source (no customer commitment, SLA, compliance, or L1 in the same excerpt). Route: park as context_pending with generated question asking for the business driver. If a business driver is confirmed later, promote to proposed.
